home.welcomeSubtitle: Services that invite calmness, connection with nature, and with the depths of Being.
home.servicesSubtitle: Discover unique wellness and connection experiences
home.cafeteriaDescription: Enjoy from Tuesday to Sunday from 10:00 to 21:00 our healthy cafeteria with conscious food options based on local products. We offer all-day brunch and exquisite beverage options. Our menu includes vegan, vegetarian, keto, dairy-free and gluten-free alternatives.
home.cafeteriaSchedule: Schedule: Tuesday to Sunday, from 10:00 to 21:30
home.giftCardsDescription: Cancagua gift card is an excellent option for them to choose what they want and when they want. It's the best alternative to give your loved ones a meaningful gift.
home.newsletterTitle: I want to stay updated with Cancagua news

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Wellness experiences designed to reconnect with your essence

biopiscinas.name: Geothermal Biopools
biopiscinas.description: Immerse yourself in the world's first geothermal biopools. Natural thermal water at 37º-40º, surrounded by nature and lake views.

hotTubs.name: Hot Tubs
hotTubs.description: Private outdoor spa with lake view. Perfect for couples or small groups seeking intimacy and relaxation.

masajes.name: Massages & Therapies
masajes.description: Holistic therapies that comfort body and mind. Therapeutic, relaxing massages and specialized treatments.

clases.name: Regular Classes
clases.description: Hatha Yoga, Functional Training and Children's Dance. Regular classes for all levels in a unique lakefront space.

paseReconecta.name: Reconnect Pass
paseReconecta.description: Half day of complete relaxation. Combines biopools, massage and access to all our facilities.

sup.name: Stand Up Paddle (SUP)
sup.description: Explore Llanquihue lake on a paddle board. Perfect activity to connect with nature and exercise.

cafeteria.description: Enjoy our cafeteria open to the public with options for all tastes and dietary needs.

giftCards.title: Cancagua Gift Cards
giftCards.subtitle: Gift wellness and connection experiences
giftCards.description: Cancagua gift card is the best option to gift unforgettable moments. The recipient can choose their preferred service and the most convenient date.
giftCards.previewCard: This is how your gift card will look
giftCards.termsText: Gift cards are valid for 12 months from purchase date. They are non-refundable and can be used for any Cancagua service. Unused balance remains available until expiration date.

about.title: About Cancagua
about.subtitle: Spa & Retreat Center in Frutillar, Chile
about.storyText: Cancagua was born from the dream of creating a comprehensive wellness space on the shores of Llanquihue lake. We are pioneers in bringing the world's first geothermal biopools to Chile, combining innovative technology with respect for nature.
about.missionText: To invite calmness, connection with nature and with the depths of Being. We offer services and experiences that nourish body, mind and spirit in a unique environment.
about.locationText: We are located in Frutillar, Los Lagos Region, Chile. On the shores of Llanquihue lake, with privileged views of Osorno volcano.
